new_value: {"description":"Create loops/scripts/scheduler.sh — the core scheduler daemon. Reads manifest for enabled companies, checks for running agents via pid files (loops/agents/{company}.pid), writes lockfiles (loops/agents/{company}.lock) with task ID before spawning, ranks open unblocked tasks by impact x urgency x company_weight. Spawns one Claude Code agent per company running /run-loop on the top-ranked task — run-loop handles subtask orchestration, dependencies, and skill chains internally. The scheduler operates at the task level, not subtask level. One agent per company max. Designed to run via cron every 15 minutes.","metadata":{"acceptanceCriteria":["scheduler.sh reads manifest and filters enabled companies","Checks pid files to skip companies with running agents","Writes lockfile with task ID before spawning agent","Ranks tasks by score (priority x urgency x company weight)","Spawns claude running /run-loop on the top-ranked task (not execute-task)","Respects blocked_hours and max_concurrent_agents from scheduler.yaml","Creates loops/agents/ directory structure"],"e2eTests":["scheduler.sh passes shellcheck","Dry-run mode lists what would be dispatched without spawning","Skips companies with scheduler.enabled: false","Skips companies with existing pid file for running process","Spawned agent prompt uses /run-loop not /execute-task"]}}

{"id":"ghq-uik.1.5","title":"GHQ Autonomous Scheduler","description":"Build the scheduler system that runs companies autonomously. The scheduler continuously checks for work, spawns Claude Code agents per company, handles failures and retries, and only escalates to the user via bd decision tasks. Includes strategy-based task generation, escalation policies, preference memory, and daily digests.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"chhassaansaleem@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-03T23:05:00Z","created_by":"Chaudhry Hassaan Saleem","updated_at":"2026-03-03T23:05:00Z","metadata":{"goal":"GHQ runs companies autonomously, only asking user for decisions","qualityGates":["shellcheck loops/scripts/*.sh"],"relatedSkills":["architect","backend"],"repoPath":"/Users/hassaansaleemmacbook2026/repos/ghq","successCriteria":"Scheduler dispatches agents for enabled companies, handles failures with retry, escalates via bd decisions, generates daily digests","workMode":"main"}}

{"id":"ghq-uik.1.5.1","title":"Add draft status and decision type to bd","description":"Extend bd with: (1) new status 'draft' (◇) for tasks that exist but aren't ready to execute, (2) new issue type 'decision' for tasks requiring human judgment, (3) new 'bd resolve' command that closes a decision with a structured answer. bd ready must exclude draft tasks. Draft status slots before open: ◇ draft ○ open ◐ in_progress ● blocked ✓ closed ❄ deferred.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"chhassaansaleem@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-03T23:05:12Z","created_by":"Chaudhry Hassaan Saleem","updated_at":"2026-03-03T23:05:12Z","metadata":{"acceptanceCriteria":["bd create --status draft creates a draft task","bd ready excludes draft tasks","bd create --type decision creates a decision task","bd resolve \u003cid\u003e --answer \u003ctext\u003e closes a decision and records the answer","bd list shows ◇ symbol for draft status"],"e2eTests":["bd create test-task --status draft \u0026\u0026 bd ready --json returns empty","bd create test-decision --type decision \u0026\u0026 bd show test-decision shows type=decision","bd resolve test-decision --answer yes closes it with recorded answer"]}}

Spawns one Claude Code agent per company running /run-loop on the top-ranked task — run-loop handles subtask orchestration, dependencies, and skill chains internally. {"id":"ghq-uik.1.5.6","title":"Build strategy planner for task generation","description":"Create the strategy-to-task planner that runs as Phase 1 of the scheduler. Reads companies/{company}/strategy.yaml (goals, cadences, milestones, task_templates). Compares against existing bd tasks. Creates draft tasks to fill gaps (e.g. cadence says 2 videos/week but only 1 exists). Planner is idempotent — running it twice produces no duplicates. Spawns a lightweight Claude agent for goal decomposition. Draft tasks appear in digest for user review.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"chhassaansaleem@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-03T23:06:05Z","created_by":"Chaudhry Hassaan Saleem","updated_at":"2026-03-03T23:06:05Z","metadata":{"acceptanceCriteria":["strategy.yaml schema defined with goals/cadence/milestone/task_template fields","Planner reads strategy and compares against existing tasks","Creates draft tasks only when gaps exist","Idempotent — no duplicate tasks on re-run","Example strategy.yaml created for at least one company"],"e2eTests":["Planner creates draft task when cadence gap detected","Planner creates nothing when all cadence slots filled","Draft tasks have correct parent epic and labels","strategy.yaml is valid YAML"]}}

{"id":"ghq-uik.1.5.7","title":"Implement failure recovery and retry logic","description":"Add failure recovery to scheduler.sh. When a dead pid is found: read lockfile to identify task, check task status in bd. If task still in_progress (agent crashed): increment retry count in task metadata, move task back to open (up to 3 retries), then block and file decision for user after 3 failures. Log crash details. Clean up stale pid and lock files.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"chhassaansaleem@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-03T23:06:17Z","created_by":"Chaudhry Hassaan Saleem","updated_at":"2026-03-03T23:06:17Z","metadata":{"acceptanceCriteria":["Scheduler detects dead pid and reads lockfile for task ID","Checks task status to distinguish clean exit from crash","Increments retry count in task metadata","Moves task to open for retry 1-3","Blocks task and creates user decision after 3 failures","Cleans up pid and lock files after handling"],"e2eTests":["Stale pid file with in_progress task triggers retry","Retry count increments correctly in task metadata","Third failure creates decision task assigned to user","Clean exit (task closed) just cleans up files"]}}

{"id":"ghq-uik.1.5.8","title":"Build daily digest generator","description":"Create loops/scripts/digest.sh that generates a daily markdown digest at loops/digests/YYYY-MM-DD.md. Reads bd state across all enabled companies. Sections: completed tasks, in-progress, blocked/failures, drafts needing review, pending decisions (with one-liner bd resolve commands). Scheduler calls this at end of day (configurable in scheduler.yaml). Digest should be scannable in 2 minutes.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"chhassaansaleem@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-03T23:06:28Z","created_by":"Chaudhry Hassaan Saleem","updated_at":"2026-03-03T23:06:28Z","metadata":{"acceptanceCriteria":["digest.sh generates markdown file at loops/digests/YYYY-MM-DD.md","Digest grouped by company","Shows completed, in-progress, blocked, failed tasks","Pending decisions include context and bd resolve commands","Drafts section shows tasks needing promotion to open","Scheduler invokes digest at configured end-of-day hour"],"e2eTests":["digest.sh produces valid markdown","Digest includes all enabled companies","Pending decisions have correct bd resolve syntax","Digest file created at correct path with date stamp"]}}

{"id":"ghq-uik.1.5.9","title":"Integration test and cron setup","description":"End-to-end integration test of the full scheduler cycle: plan → dispatch → monitor → recover → digest. Create a test script that simulates: enabled company with open tasks, agent completion, agent crash with retry, decision escalation, and digest generation. Set up launchd plist (or cron) for the scheduler to run every 15 minutes. Document the full system in knowledge/ghq-core/scheduler.md.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"chhassaansaleem@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-03T23:06:38Z","created_by":"Chaudhry Hassaan Saleem","updated_at":"2026-03-03T23:06:38Z","metadata":{"acceptanceCriteria":["Integration test script exercises full scheduler cycle","Test covers: dispatch, clean completion, crash recovery, decision escalation","launchd plist or cron entry created for 15-min scheduling","knowledge/ghq-core/scheduler.md documents the full system","Dry-run mode available for testing without spawning real agents"],"e2eTests":["Integration test completes without errors","Scheduler runs via cron/launchd and produces log output","Dry-run produces expected dispatch plan","Documentation covers all scheduler components"]}}
